name: 5' x 7' Botanical Rectangular Woven Outdoor Area Rug Blue/Green - Threshold™: Durable, Traditional Jacquard Design, Hose Clean
description:
Add some tropical vibes to your patio or any other outdoor space with this Botanical Rectangular Woven Outdoor Area Rug from Threshold™. The rectangular rug is adorned with a beautiful botanical design, complete with colorful leaves and flowers in blue, pink and green shades on a white background. Boasting a latex backing to help prevent slippage, this woven rug has a flat-pile construction, making it suitable for high-traffic areas and easy to clean.

Threshold™: Looks like home, feels like you.
